topic: sweet food and wine sensory contrast
trigger_keywords: dulzor en la comida sobre el vino
vino se perciba más amargo, ácido y menos frutal
impacto del azúcar en los alimentos sobre la percepción del vino
vino parezca más amargo y ácido
comida puede aumentar la percepción de acidez en un vino
alimento dulce sobre un vino seco
vino se perciba más ácido y amargo

steps.label: cause
steps.text: The food is sweeter than the wine served with it.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The food's sweetness creates a contrast that lowers the wine's perceived sweetness and fruit while exposing its acid and bitter components.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine can seem drier, more acidic, more bitter, and less fruity, especially when the wine itself is dry.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine can seem drier, more acidic, more bitter, and less fruity, especially when the wine itself is dry.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
